name: bruce-drawio
description: Cross-platform draw.io diagram generator. Use when user wants to create any diagram: flowchart, architecture, UML (sequence/class), ER, mindmap, network topology. Trigger: 'draw diagram', 'flowchart', 'architecture diagram', 'UML', 'sequence diagram', 'mindmap', 'ER diagram', 'network topology', 'visualize'. Workflow: LLM generates drawio XML -> self-review -> CLI export PNG/SVG/PDF. Supports Windows, macOS, Linux.
author: brucevanfdm@gmail.com
